key_metadata.description: ProteinGYM DMS Benchmark DMS Benchmark includes three types of mutations: indels, single substitution and multiple substitutions. Here we use randomly cross-validation scheme, where the data for each task is randomly divided into five folds and the fold_id column indicates the fold assignment.
